name: Macrame Wall Hanging
description: Hand-knotted macrame wall art in natural cotton rope. Adds a bohemian warmth to any living room or bedroom wall. Each piece is individually handcrafted, making every one subtly unique in texture and form.

name: Terracotta Planter Set
description: Set of 3 handmade terracotta planters with drainage holes. Perfect for succulents, herbs, and small indoor plants. Earthy and rustic with a smooth matte finish.

name: Wooden Photo Frame Trio
description: Set of 3 solid mango wood photo frames. Clean minimal design, fits 4x6, 5x7, and 8x10 prints. Lacquered for durability with a natural wood grain finish.

name: Soy Wax Pillar Candles
description: Hand-poured soy wax pillar candles, set of 4 in vanilla, sandalwood, jasmine, and lavender. Burns cleanly up to 40 hours each. Perfect for fragrance and ambient decor.

name: Rattan Pendant Light Shade
description: Natural rattan woven pendant shade for E27 bulb holders. Creates a warm, dappled light effect ideal for dining rooms, living areas, and reading nooks.

name: Handwoven Cotton Throw
description: Soft handwoven cotton throw blanket in a classic stripe pattern. 100% cotton, machine washable. 130x180 cm. Ideal draped over sofas, beds, or armchairs.

name: Geometric Brass Bookends
description: Pair of solid brass pyramid bookends. Heavy and substantial — holds large collections with ease. Adds a refined metallic accent to shelves and desks. Limited batch production.

name: Jute Table Runner
description: Natural jute table runner with fringed edges, 30x200 cm. Eco-friendly and rustic. Perfect for dining tables, console tables, or sideboard styling.

name: Ceramic Bud Vase Set
description: Set of 5 hand-thrown ceramic bud vases in speckled white and warm clay tones. Every piece is unique. Ideal for single stems, dried flowers, or pampas grass.

name: Pressed Flower Art Kit
description: Complete DIY pressed flower framing kit. Includes flower press, 3 frames, mounting tools, and an illustrated step-by-step guide. Great beginner project for all ages.

name: Epoxy Resin Tray Kit
description: DIY epoxy resin tray kit with silicone mold (30x20 cm), 500ml resin and hardener, pigment powders, glitter, and brushes. Makes 2-3 premium decorative trays.

name: Woven Seagrass Baskets
description: Set of 3 nesting seagrass baskets with leather handles (S, M, L). Ideal for blanket storage, toy organisation, or laundry. Sustainable natural material.

name: Floating Pine Shelves
description: Set of 3 solid pine floating wall shelves in 40, 50, and 60 cm lengths. Includes hidden wall brackets. Easy installation, load-tested to 10 kg each.

name: Mirror Mosaic Tray
description: Handcrafted mirror mosaic serving tray in antique silver finish, 30x45 cm. Brings a glamorous editorial touch to vanity tables, coffee tables, or nightstands.

name: Cement Geometric Candle Holders
description: Set of 4 DIY-cast cement tealight holders in hexagon, cube, sphere, and pyramid forms. Clean and minimalist, suits any modern or industrial interior.

name: Indigo Block Print Cushion Covers
description: Set of 2 hand block printed cotton cushion covers in traditional Rajasthani indigo patterns. 45x45 cm with concealed zipper. Machine washable. Limited stock.

name: Dried Pampas Grass Bunch
description: Natural dried pampas grass stems, bundle of 5, approx 80-90 cm tall. Zero maintenance. Adds warmth and texture to modern, minimal, or boho interiors.

name: Chalkboard Kitchen Label Kit
description: Pack of 24 reusable chalkboard labels in assorted shapes plus chalk marker. Waterproof and rewritable. Label jars, spice racks, and pantry shelves with ease.

name: Polymer Clay Earring Kit
description: DIY polymer clay earring kit with 10 clay colors, rolling pin, shape cutters, earring hooks, and full illustrated instructions. Makes 15-20 pairs. No oven required.

name: Bamboo Organizer Tray
description: Modular bamboo drawer and counter organizer with 6 compartments, expandable up to 3x. Ideal for kitchen utensils, desk supplies, and bathroom essentials.
